violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the bathrooms was lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC refilled sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance and back storage, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC refilled container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Single service items was observed stored on floor in the breakroom. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Ice chest on service line is lacking an air-gap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Food safety certificates must be obtained. Once certificates are obtained, establishment to register a Rhode Island Food Protection Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The FRP lined walls by the mop sink and 3 bay sink are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
